briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the window within which the csc core will have an impact.

detaileddescription.para: Coordinates outside the window will be passed as-is to output

briefdescription.para: CSC Layer 2 Register Map.

detaileddescription.para: Each instance of the csc core will have it's own register map

memberdef.argsstring: (s32 YCC2RGB[3][4], XVidC_ColorStd cstdIn, s32 pixPrec, s32 *ClampMin, s32 *ClipMax, XVidC_ColorRange cRangeOut)
memberdef.name: cscFwYCbCrtoRGB

briefdescription.para: This function sets coefficients for YCbCr to RGB conversion.

parameterdescription.para: is the array to hold coefficients
is input color standard
is the color depth
is min value to clamp computed by the function
is max value to saturate computed by the function

memberdef.argsstring: (s32 RGB2YCC[3][4], XVidC_ColorStd cstdOut, s32 pixPrec, s32 *ClampMin, s32 *ClipMax, XVidC_ColorRange cRangeOut)
memberdef.name: cscFwRGBtoYCbCr

briefdescription.para: This function sets coefficients for RGB to YCbCr conversion.

parameterdescription.para: is the array to hold coefficients
is output color standard
is the color depth
is min value to clamp computed by the function
is max value to saturate computed by the function

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_Csc_l2 *CscPtr, s32 K[3][4], s32 ClampMin, s32 ClipMax)
memberdef.name: cscFwSetCoefficients

briefdescription.para: This function writes demo window coefficients to layer 2 fw register bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to layer 2 fw register bank
is an array to hold coefficients
is min value to clamp
is max value to saturate

briefdescription.para: This function gets the current RGB coefficients for demo window.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to layer 2 fw register bank
is the array to hold coefficients

briefdescription.para: This function sets the current RGB coefficients for demo window.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to layer 2 fw register bank
is the array to hold coefficients

briefdescription.para: This function multiplies Matrices.

detaileddescription.para: (Utility function)

parameterdescription.para: input matrix
input matrix
is the output matrix (K1 * K2)

briefdescription.para: Compute the coefficients for the required color space and write to layer 2 fw register bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to layer 2 fw register bank
is the active coefficients

briefdescription.para: Write computed coefficients to IP HW registers.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core instance
is a pointer to layer 2 fw register bank
is the window mode: Full Frame or Demo window

briefdescription.para: This function provides the write interface for FW register bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to layer 2 of csc core instance
is register offset
is data to write

briefdescription.para: This function provides the read interface for FW register bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to layer 2 of csc core instance
is register offset

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the core instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon
is instance id of the core

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if device is found and initialized XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if device is not found

briefdescription.para: This function sets the CSC IP layer 2 fw registers to power on default state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the layer 2

briefdescription.para: This function starts the Color space converter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function stops the Color space converter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function set the frame resolution for the Color space converter This also will reset the demo window to full frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is the input stream width
is the input stream height

briefdescription.para: This function sets the demo window for the Color space converter.

detaileddescription.para: Any pixel outside the demo window will not be impacted and will be passed to output as-is

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is structure that contains window coordinates and size

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if this core instance has the demo window enabled XST_FAILURE if this instance does not have the demo window enabled

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_Csc_l2 *InstancePtr, XVidC_ColorFormat cfmtIn, XVidC_ColorFormat cfmtOut, XVidC_ColorStd cstdIn, XVidC_ColorStd cstdOut, XVidC_ColorRange cRangeOut)
memberdef.name: XV_CscSetColorspace

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Color space converter to user specified settings.

detaileddescription.para: Before any feature specific calls in layer-2 driver is made the csc core should have been configured via this call.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is input color space
is output color space
is input color standard
is output color standard
is the selected output range

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the requested color format is allowed XST_FAILURE if YUV422/420 color format is requested but not allowed

briefdescription.para: This function set brightness to specified value.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates user setting of 0-100 to hw register range

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core instance
is new brightness value

briefdescription.para: This function set contrast to specified value.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates user setting of 0-100 to hw register range

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core instance
is new contrast value

briefdescription.para: This function set saturation to specified value.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates user setting of 0-100 to hw register range

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core instance
is new saturation value

briefdescription.para: This function set red gain to specified value.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates user setting of 0-100 to hw register range

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core instance
is new gain value

briefdescription.para: This function set green gain to specified value.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates user setting of 0-100 to hw register range

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core instance
is new gain value

briefdescription.para: This function set blue gain to specified value.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates user setting of 0-100 to hw register range

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core instance
is new gain value

briefdescription.para: This function prints CSC IP status on console.

parameterdescription.para: is the instance pointer to the CSC IP instance to be worked on

briefdescription.para: XV_CSC Hardware Register Definitions.

detaileddescription.para: This header file defines the register addresses and bit widths for the XV_CSC hardware module. The XV_CSC module is typically used for color space conversion operations in embedded systems.

Register Address Map:
Control and Status Registers:
XV_CSC_CTRL_ADDR_AP_CTRL: Control register
XV_CSC_CTRL_ADDR_GIE: Global interrupt enable
XV_CSC_CTRL_ADDR_IER: Interrupt enable register
XV_CSC_CTRL_ADDR_ISR: Interrupt status register
Configuration Registers:
HWREG_INVIDEOFORMAT_DATA: Input video format (8 bits)
HWREG_OUTVIDEOFORMAT_DATA: Output video format (8 bits)
HWREG_WIDTH_DATA: Frame width (16 bits)
HWREG_HEIGHT_DATA: Frame height (16 bits)
HWREG_COLSTART_DATA / HWREG_COLEND_DATA: Column start/end (16 bits)
HWREG_ROWSTART_DATA / HWREG_ROWEND_DATA: Row start/end (16 bits)
Color Space Conversion Coefficients:
HWREG_K11_DATA to HWREG_K33_DATA: 3x3 matrix coefficients (16 bits each)
HWREG_ROFFSET_V_DATA, HWREG_GOFFSET_V_DATA, HWREG_BOFFSET_V_DATA: RGB offsets (12 bits each)
HWREG_CLAMPMIN_V_DATA, HWREG_CLIPMAX_V_DATA: Clamp min/max values (10 bits each)
Secondary Coefficient Set:
HWREG_K11_2_DATA to HWREG_K33_2_DATA: Alternate 3x3 matrix coefficients (16 bits each)
HWREG_ROFFSET_2_V_DATA, HWREG_GOFFSET_2_V_DATA, HWREG_BOFFSET_2_V_DATA: Alternate RGB offsets (12 bits each)
HWREG_CLAMPMIN_2_V_DATA, HWREG_CLIPMAX_2_V_DATA: Alternate clamp min/max values (10 bits each)
Each register address is defined as an offset from the base address of the XV_CSC hardware module. The corresponding bit width for each register is also defined for proper data handling.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets color depth for CSC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to csc layer 2 fw register map
is the requested color depth

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current brightness setting by reading layer 2 fw register map.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates between hw register value and user view

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current contrast setting by reading layer 2 fw register map.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates between hw register value and user view

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current saturation setting by reading layer 2 fw register map.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates between hw register value and user view

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current red gain setting by reading layer 2 fw register map.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates between hw register value and user view

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current green gain setting by reading layer 2 fw register map.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates between hw register value and user view

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current blue gain setting by reading layer 2 fw register map.

detaileddescription.para: It also translates between hw register value and user view

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current set input color format by reading layer 2 fw register map.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para:
Current set input color format
XVIDC_CSF_RGB
XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444
XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422
XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current set output color format by reading layer 2 fw register map.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para:
Current set output color format
XVIDC_CSF_RGB
XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444
XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422
XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current set input color standard by reading layer 2 fw register map.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para:
Current set input color standard
XVIDC_BT_2020
XVIDC_BT_709
XVIDC_BT_601

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current set output color standard by reading layer 2 fw register map.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para:
Current set output color standard
XVIDC_BT_2020
XVIDC_BT_709
XVIDC_BT_601

briefdescription.para: This macro returns current set output range by reading layer 2 fw register map.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para:
Current set output range
XVIDC_CR_16_235
XVIDC_CR_16_240
XVIDC_CR_0_255

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if Csc instance is enabled for 4:2:2 processing.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para: Returns 1 if condition is TRUE or 0 if FALSE

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if Csc instance is enabled for 4:2:0 processing.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para: Returns 1 if condition is TRUE or 0 if FALSE

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if Csc instance is enabled for the Demo Window.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to csc core layer 2

simplesect.para: Returns 1 if condition is TRUE or 0 if FALSE

briefdescription.para: Hardware register definitions for the Xilinx Video Color Space Converter (CSC) core.

detaileddescription.para: This header file contains layer 2 API's of the csc sub-core driver.

This header file defines the register offsets and bit widths for the control and configuration registers of the Xilinx Video Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware core. These macros are used to access and configure the CSC hardware via memory-mapped I/O. The CSC core performs color space conversion operations, such as RGB to YUV and vice versa, in video processing pipelines.

The register map includes:
Control and status registers (AP_CTRL, GIE, IER, ISR)
Video format configuration (input/output format)
Frame dimension and region selection (width, height, column/row start/end)
Color conversion matrix coefficients (K11-K33 and K11_2-K33_2)
Offset and clamp/clip parameters for each color channel
Each register is defined with its memory offset and the number of bits used for its data field. These definitions facilitate low-level driver development and hardware abstraction for the CSC core.
The functions contained herein provides a high level implementation of features provided by the IP, abstracting away the register level details from the user

The CSC IP supports following features
Set a Demo Window (user can select a sub-frame where above features will have effect). This Demo Window is optionally included in the CSC IP.
Supports resolution up to 4k2k 60Hz
up to 16 bits color depth
1, 2 or 4 pixel per clock processing

The Layer 2 driver of Color Space Conversion core offers following features
Set/Get Brightness, contrast, saturation
Set/Get Gain for R/G/B channel
Set/Get Input/Output Color Standard (BT601, BT709, BT2020)
Set/Get Input/Output Color Format (RGB, YUV444, YUV422)
All settings are translated between user range (0-100) and IP supported range

This driver makes use of the video enumerations and data types defined in the Xilinx Video Common Driver (video_common_vX.x) and as such the common driver must be included as dependency to compile this driver
The device driver enables higher layer software (e.g., an application) to communicate to the CSC core.

Before using the layer-2 API's user must initialize the core by calling Layer-1 API XV_csc_Initialize(). This function will look for a configuration structure for the device and initialize it to defined HW settings. After initialization Layer-2 API's can be used to configure the core. It is recommended user always make use of Layer-2 API to interact with the core Advanced users always have the capability to directly interact with the core using Layer-1 API's that perform low level register peek/poke.
This driver does not have any interrupts
This driver supports Virtual Memory. The RTOS is responsible for calculating the correct device base address in Virtual Memory space.
This driver is not thread safe. Any needs for threads or thread mutual exclusion must be satisfied by the layer above this driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 rco 07/21/15 Initial Release 2.00 rco 11/05/15 Integrate layer-1 with layer-2 dmc 12/17/15 Macros query Is422Enabled, IsDemoWindowEnabled flags that were added to the XV_csc_Config structure 2.20 vyc 10/04/17 Macro queries Is420Enabled flag that was added to the XV_csc_Config structure
